title: Scoville Xtra 36cm Roasting Tray, Non Stick Roasting Tray for Oven, NEVERSTICK Coated, Oven Safe Up To 260°C, Easy to Clean, Perfect for Vegetables & Meats, Dishwasher Safe, Toughened Aluminium, Black
features: 36CM ROASTING TRAY: The Scoville Xtra 36cm roasting tray is a kitchen essential, perfect for all your everyday roasting and baking needs. Whether you're roasting veggies or preparing a Sunday roast, this non-stick tray delivers great results every time. Crafted from toughened aluminium, it’s designed for durability and even heat distribution. Available exclusively at Scoville and Amazon – you won’t find this top-quality oven tray anywhere else!

SUPER STRONG NON-STICK: This large roasting tray features Scoville's award-winning Neverstick coating, proven to be 5x stronger than other non-sticks. With such impressive non-stick performance, you can bake your favourite treats without needing any oil or butter!
EASY TO CLEAN: Designed for everyday use, this oven tray is dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleaning. For long-lasting non-stick performance, handwashing is recommended.
OVEN SAFE UP TO 260°C: Compatible with all household ovens and crafted to handle temperatures up to 260°C.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: SCOVILLE provides a lifetime guarantee with this product, covering any manufacturing defects or material issues during normal household use. To register your guarantee and access care instructions, please visit Scoville's website.
